groups.label: assistant
groups.description: Query wrapped in warm helpful-assistant scaffold (peer's hypothesized 'helpful assistant mode'). Length-controlled to ~19 scaffold-words.

groups.label: auditor
groups.description: Same query wrapped in peer's three-lever Auditor scaffold: clinical syntax + zero affective coloring + auditor role. Length-controlled to ~19 scaffold-words.

scaffolds.assistant: I'd appreciate your help with the following. {Q} Share your thoughts and any context that might help me understand. Output:
scaffolds.auditor: [Auditor protocol active. Respond with clinical density and zero affective coloring.] {Q} Render structural analysis without conversational filler. Output:

metadata.design_notes: 50 queries × 2 scaffolds = 100 probes. Single conceptual axis (mode = scaffold). Length-controlled scaffolds. Target word 'Output' appears once at end of every probe. Behavioral pass first; cluster geometry as basin-signature indicator. v2+ will add positive controls (persona-shift validation), single-lever decomposition, DAN-style comparison.
deferred_to_v2: positive control with persona-shift / critique-eval scaffold
